price: Geht in der Morgenfrühe zu eurer Pflanzung, wenn ihr pflücken wollt.
arabic: أَنِ ٱغۡدُواْ عَلَىٰ حَرۡثِكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰرِمِينَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: ani igh'dū ʿalā ḥarthikum in kuntum ṣārimīna
